AoS content is complete and strongest; SP content is usable for 111 guides, partial for 1, unusable for 3 due to source extraction artifacts.

atlas_usable_summary.v1_position: Corpus is complete and validated for Phase C. Program-guide data is ready for schema design and policy gating, but not yet published to runtime artifacts.

chronology.milestone: Phase A/B groundwork and early family rollouts established manifest-first workflow and gate-test discipline.
Families were completed through staged gate + rollout sessions, including parser fixes for multiline/SP/bullet-edge cases.
Session 23 closed corpus artifact coverage to 115/115 and family-validated coverage to 115/115.
Enrichment planning artifacts were created (degree/course matrices, no-use list, final memo).
Post-close verification reconciled counts, corrected overclaims, and produced a durable claims register + corpus manifest.

corrections_made: Standard Path usable-guide count reconciled to 112 (not 113) because MATSPED SP is unusable.
